    I

    initialize(URL, ResourceBundle) - Method in class edu.univalle.cincuentazo.controller.GameController
     
    InvalidMoveException - Exception Class in edu.univalle.cincuentazo.exception
    Checked exception thrown when a card cannot be played by the current rules.
    InvalidMoveException(String) - Constructor for exception class edu.univalle.cincuentazo.exception.InvalidMoveException
    Creates an invalid move exception.
    isActive() - Method in class edu.univalle.cincuentazo.model.AbstractPlayer
     
    isActive() - Method in interface edu.univalle.cincuentazo.model.Player
    Indicates whether the player is still in the game.
    isAwaitingDraw() - Method in class edu.univalle.cincuentazo.model.GameModel
    Indicates whether the current player must draw.
    isEmpty() - Method in class edu.univalle.cincuentazo.model.Deck
    Checks whether the deck has no cards.
    isFlexible() - Method in class edu.univalle.cincuentazo.model.Card
    Indicates whether this card can be played with more than one value.
    isFlexible() - Method in enum class edu.univalle.cincuentazo.model.Rank
    Indicates whether the rank can use more than one value.
    isGameOver() - Method in class edu.univalle.cincuentazo.model.GameModel
    Indicates whether the game is finished.
    isGameStarted() - Method in class edu.univalle.cincuentazo.model.GameModel
    Indicates whether a game has started.
    isHuman() - Method in class edu.univalle.cincuentazo.model.AbstractPlayer
     
    isHuman() - Method in interface edu.univalle.cincuentazo.model.Player
    Indicates whether the player is controlled by the human.
    isRed() - Method in enum class edu.univalle.cincuentazo.model.Suit
    Indicates whether the suit is traditionally red.
